en: He loves you, but he ain't got time
Here's the answer, come and get it
At a knockdown price
Full of honey, just to make him sweet
ko: 꿀로 가득 채워, 그를 달콤하게 만들어

en: So ballin', just to help him see
ko: 너무 멋져, 그가 볼 수 있게 도와줘

en: What he's been missin'
So come and get it, while you still got time
ko: 그러니 와서 가져가, 아직 시간이 있을 때

en: So boy on his knees and repeat after me, say
ko: 자, 무릎 꿇고 따라 해봐, 말해

en: Take a sip of my secret potion
ko: 내 비밀 물약을 한 모금 마셔봐

en: I'll make you fall in love
For a spell that can't be broken
One drop should be enough
Boy, you belong to me
I got the recipe
And it's called black magic
It's called black magic
Take a sip of my secret potion
ko: 내 비밀 물약을 한 모금 마셔봐

en: One taste and you'll be mine
ko: 한 번 맛보면 넌 내 거야

en: It's a spell that can't be broken
It'll keep you up all night
ko: 밤새 잠 못 들게 할 거야

en: Boy, you belong to me
